item.title: USF Turns 70 As you get older, anniversa...

item.title: The meme is now legendary and even has i...
item.description: The meme is now legendary and even has its own emoji, “⁶🤷⁷.” Learning something new on a Friday! #MemeCulture #FridayVibes #EmojiFun

item.title: The puckered texture of seersucker actua...
item.description: The puckered texture of seersucker actually keeps the fabric away from your skin, making it perfect for warm days and fresh ideas. 👔🌞👖 #NationalSeeSuckerDay

item.title: Well, got a lot done today. My home netw...
item.description: Well, got a lot done today. My home network is all running at 2.5Gbps now, thanks to Unifi. The ISP line is still 1Gbps up and down. I might upgrade it, but not for a while. I also knocked a bunch of other things off my backlog ✅. Productive Saturday! #HomeNetworking #Unifi #TechUpgrade

item.title: Comet TV is airing Galaxy Guest live rig...
item.description: Comet TV is airing Galaxy Guest live right now and the cast is fantastic. It’s such a funny show 😂, just what I needed on a Friday. I’m laughing so hard at this silly yet really good entertainment 🤣. I’ve seen this show plenty of times, but it’s been a while. #Entertainment #GalaxyGuest

item.title: What a weekend! 🚀 I set up a Gemini caps...
item.description: What a weekend! 🚀 I set up a Gemini capsule site 🪐, got my own PeerTube instance running, and added https://michaelreflects.com to my Zola site 🌐. Everything’s now https://standard.site ready with Bridgy Fed, Bluesky, and the AT protocol. #SelfHosting #PeerTube #GeminiProtocol

item.title: A lesser-known fact: Memorial Day 🇺🇸 was...
item.description: A lesser-known fact: Memorial Day 🇺🇸 was originally called Decoration Day because of the 🕯️ floral tributes left on 🎖️ graves. #MemorialDay #RememberAndHonor #Holiday

item.title: AI Isn't Black and White Okay, this will...
item.description: AI Isn't Black and White Okay, this will probably sound controversial, but that's not my intent. I'm just sharing my thoughts because AI is everywhere right now, especially on social media and in blog posts. These... https://mitchelltribe.com/2026/05/17/ai-isnt-black-and-white/
